labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621492 ($9,406,523,079) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621492 ($29,382,107,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $215,888 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621492); class <5: 158 firms, avg revenue/firm $643,899 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $101,736 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 71 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,278,845 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $202,058 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 92 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,086,196 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $329,619 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 118 firms, avg revenue/firm $6,187,881 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $977,685 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 26 firms, avg revenue/firm $23,230,423 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,670,407 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 42 firms, avg revenue/firm $658,654,333 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $104,067,385 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 26
